text.title: Schema Version Pinning Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every schema-version-pinning spec MUST enforce.

rule.statement: Every JSON schema MUST carry a top-level $version semver.
rule.rationale: Without version, drift is invisible until it crashes a consumer.

rule.statement: Agents MUST pin against ~major.minor (compatible-within-minor). Patch-only changes allowed.
rule.rationale: Pin too tight = no upgrades; pin too loose = breaking changes leak in.

rule.statement: Any breaking change MUST bump major + ship a migration script + 30-day deprecation window.
rule.rationale: Surprise breaking changes are the failure mode this methodology prevents.

rule.statement: Recorded calls from record-replay-debugging MUST be migrateable forward via the migration script.
Tool-call payloads MUST include $schema_version so the receiver can route to the right handler.
rule.rationale: Without the field, multi-version handlers can't disambiguate.
